name: kokic/on-site-install
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y fonts-noto-cjk curl && sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/share/fonts && sudo curl -fL -o /usr/local/share/fonts/FluentEmojiColor.ttf https://tetunori.github.io/fluent-emoji-webfont/dist/FluentEmojiColor.ttf && fc-cache -fv
